message.content:
{
  "units": [
    {
      "declaration_names": [
        "NPartition.toPartition",
        "NPartition.ofPartition",
        "NPartition.toPartition_ofPartition",
        "NPartition.ofPartition_toPartition"
      ],
      "lean_file_body": "open Finset

namespace NPartition

variable {N : ℕ}

/-- Given a partition λ of length ℓ ≤ N, produce an N-partition by padding with zeros. -/
def ofPartition (λ : Nat.Partition (∑ i : Fin N, 0)) (h : λ.length ≤ N) : NPartition N :=
  { parts := λ.parts.extend (fun _ : Fin N => 0) (by
      have hlen : λ.parts.length ≤ N := h.trans (by simp)
      exact hlen)
    antitone := by
      -- We need to show that the extended sequence is antitone.
      -- Since λ.parts is already a partition (nonincreasing) and we pad with zeros,
      -- the antitone property holds.
      intro i j hij
      simp [Function.funext_iff]
      sorry
  }

/-- Given an N-partition, drop trailing zeros to get a partition of length ≤ N. -/
def toPartition' (μ : NPartition N) : Nat.Partition μ.size :=
  μ.toPartition

/-- The composition `toPartition' ∘ ofPartition` is identity. -/
theorem toPartition_ofPartition (λ : Nat.Partition (∑ i : Fin N, 0)) (h : λ.length ≤ N) :
    (ofPartition λ h).toPartition' = λ := by
  ext i
  simp [toPartition', ofPartition, NPartition.toPartition]
  sorry

/-- The composition `ofPartition ∘ toPartition'` is identity. -/
theorem ofPartition_toPartition (μ : NPartition N) :
    ofPartition μ.toPartition' (by
      have hlen : μ.toPartition'.length ≤ N := by
        -- The length of the partition is at most N because we drop zeros.
        sorry
      exact hlen) = μ := by
  ext i
  simp [toPartition', ofPartition, NPartition.toPartition]
  sorry

end NPartition",
      "notes": [
        "The proofs are incomplete; the antitone condition and length bounds need to be filled in. The Mathlib Nat.Partition.length is not available as a checked identifier, so we used a placeholder. The construction of ofPartition is sketched but not fully verified."
      ],
      "status": "cannot_prove_from_visible_context",
      "unit_key": "unit-001",
      "used_context": [
        "NPartition structure from AlgebraicCombinatorics/SymmetricFunctions/NPartition.lean",
        "NPartition.toPartition from same file",
        "Nat.Partition from Mathlib (checked signature)",
        "source proposition prop.sf.Npar-as-par"
      ]
    }
  ]
}
